summary: The batch exhibits a high level of redundancy in phrasing and structure, particularly in refund requests and account issues, with many samples using similar constructions and expressions. There is a lack of nuanced scenarios and varied vocabulary, leading to a near-duplicate quality in several texts.
missing_modes: More varied emotional expressions in complaints and refund requests.
Different sentence structures and vocabulary for technical problems.
Unique scenarios that explore less common issues or resolutions.
overrepresented_modes: Informal and emotional styles in refund requests.
Fragmented and concise styles in technical problems.
Common scenarios for account issues and complaints.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more unique scenarios and resolutions, especially for refund requests and account issues.
Incorporate a wider range of emotional tones and vocabulary to enhance the richness of the texts.
Introduce more complex sentence structures and varied phrasing to reduce redundancy.
